name: The Moneyfast Credit Repair
description_short: Chicago-based credit repair company that disputes errors and inaccuracies on credit reports to help restore credit scores nationwide.
description_long:
Nationwide Credit Clearing is a Chicago-based credit restoration company with over three decades of operating history. The company serves clients across the nation with credit repair services focused on identifying and disputing errors, discrepancies, and outdated information on credit reports. Their service model centers on the premise that many consumers' credit scores are artificially depressed due to inaccurate or unfair reporting.

The company offers a tiered program structure with Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Platinum packages. Their process begins with a soft credit inquiry and thorough review of the client's credit file to identify mistakes and discrepancies. They position themselves as handling the dispute process on behalf of clients while maintaining regular communication throughout. The company emphasizes speed, claiming clients can see results within weeks. They also offer promotional incentives, including $25 off packages for new sign-ups and a free consultation and credit report review.

Nationwide Credit Clearing distinguishes itself through its longevity in the market, established local presence with a phone-based service model (773-862-7700), and emphasis on professional service. They highlight client testimonials showing significant score improvements (700+ range mentioned) and emphasize going "above and beyond." The company commits to privacy, explicitly stating they do not sell client information to third parties and use consent-based contact methods.

Like all credit repair companies, the core limitation is that they can only dispute items—they cannot remove accurate negative information or guarantee specific score improvements. The website lacks detail on pricing, timeline specifics, success rates, or what distinguishes their dispute methodology. The testimonial provided is singular and anecdotal. Consumers should understand that legitimate credit repair takes time and results depend heavily on the validity of disputed items.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 30+ years of operating history provides established track record and market credibility
Free credit report review and consultation with no upfront obligation mentioned
Tiered pricing structure (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum) offering options for different budgets
Localized Chicago presence with direct phone line (773-862-7700) for customer service
Explicit privacy commitment: does not sell client information to third parties
Consent-based contact methods (text, phone, email) with opt-out option
Client testimonial showing significant score improvement into 700+ range within 9 months
cons: Vague pricing information—no specific costs listed for any tier on the website
No published success rates, dispute success percentages, or performance metrics provided
Limited detail on actual dispute methodology or what makes their process different from competitors
Only one testimonial provided; lacks volume of social proof or independent reviews
No transparency on timeline—claims 'within weeks' but no specific benchmarks given
Cannot guarantee results since credit repair is limited to disputing items, not removing accurate negatives
best_for: Consumers with errors, outdated information, or discrepancies on their credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
People with damaged credit scores who want hands-off management of the dispute process
Clients in or near Chicago who prefer local, phone-based customer service relationships
Those seeking a company with long operational history and established market presence
diagnosis: Nationwide Credit Clearing is best for consumers who believe their credit reports contain errors or outdated information and want a professional company with three decades of history to manage disputes on their behalf. The main caveat is that credit repair cannot remove accurate negative items—results depend entirely on the validity of disputed information—and the website provides minimal pricing or performance transparency to evaluate whether their services offer competitive value.
services: Soft credit inquiry and credit report analysis
Identification of errors, discrepancies, and inaccurate information on credit reports
Dispute filing and management on behalf of clients
Regular client communication throughout the process
Four-tier program packages (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum)
Nationwide credit restoration service (not limited to Chicago)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
